title: STAR - UMBC Financial Sentiment Analysis Project
content:
Project: UMBC Financial Crisis and Sentiment Analysis Workflow

Situation:
- Financial risk analysis use case required extracting meaningful signals from noisy textual and market-related inputs.

Task:
- Build an applied NLP and simulation workflow to support sentiment-driven risk interpretation.

Action:
- Implemented sentiment analysis stages using finance-oriented NLP modeling approaches.
- Combined sentiment outputs with simulation or scenario analysis components for risk framing.
- Structured the pipeline to connect model outputs with interpretable decision context.
- Evaluated output quality with task-relevant performance and consistency checks.

Result:
- Source-reported solid sentiment modeling outcomes in academic project context.
- Added experience in translating NLP signals into financially meaningful narratives.
